title: tengine.shadergen.eval.completed v1
description: Response to tengine.shadergen.eval.requested.v1, correlated by correlation_id. Emitted by scripts/eval_contract/svdag_eval_consumer.py after run_eval() finishes (or rejects/times out/errors). status='ok' carries screenshot_path + timing; any other status carries `error`.

correlation_id.description: Matches the correlation_id of the originating eval.requested event.

candidate_id.description: Matches the candidate_id of the originating eval.requested event.

domain.description: Kernel domain echoed from the request.

status.description: ok: rendered successfully. rejected: malformed request or unknown silo/splice_target. timeout: run_eval exceeded EVAL_TIMEOUT_S. render_error: driver raised.

completed_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp the response was produced.

screenshot_path.description: Present when status=ok: path to the rendered PNG.

bytes.description: Screenshot byte size, when available from the driver.

build_ms.description: SVDAG build time in milliseconds, when available.

render_ms.description: Render time in milliseconds, when available.

error.description: Present when status != ok: failure detail.
